intent: Follow up after a client discovery meeting
key_facts: Thank the client for meeting on Tuesday
Summarize that they want automation for invoice processing
Mention the proposed pilot timeline of 3 weeks
Request access to 20 sample invoices
reference_email:
Subject: Follow-Up on Tuesday's Discovery Meeting

Dear Ms. Rao,

Thank you for meeting with us on Tuesday. It was valuable to learn more about your current workflow and the need to automate invoice processing.

As discussed, we believe a pilot can be completed within three weeks to demonstrate feasibility and expected gains. To begin that work, could you please share access to 20 sample invoices at your convenience?

Once we receive the documents, we will prepare the pilot plan and next steps.

Best regards,
Victor Jose

intent: Request clarification on a job offer
key_facts: Express appreciation for the offer
Ask whether the role is hybrid or fully onsite
Ask about the expected joining date
Mention excitement about the AI Engineer opportunity
reference_email:
Subject: Clarification Regarding AI Engineer Offer

Dear Hiring Team,

Thank you very much for extending the AI Engineer opportunity. I truly appreciate the offer and am excited about the possibility of joining your team.

Before I proceed, I would be grateful if you could clarify whether the role is hybrid or fully onsite. I would also appreciate confirmation of the expected joining date.

Thank you again for the opportunity. I look forward to your response.

Sincerely,
Victor Jose

intent: Send an apology for delayed project delivery
key_facts: Acknowledge the delay in submitting the dashboard
Explain that data validation took longer than expected
Commit to delivering the final version by Friday 5 PM
Offer to share the current draft immediately
reference_email:
Subject: Apology for the Delay in Dashboard Delivery

Dear Team,

I sincerely apologize for the delay in submitting the dashboard. I understand the inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your patience.

The primary reason for the delay is that the data validation process took longer than expected, and I wanted to ensure the final output is accurate. I am committed to delivering the final version by Friday at 5 PM.

If helpful, I can share the current draft immediately so you have visibility into the progress.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Victor Jose

intent: Ask a professor for a recommendation letter
key_facts: Mention applying for an MSc scholarship
Mention the deadline is April 30
Say you studied Applied Physics under them
Offer to send resume and statement of purpose
reference_email:
Subject: Request for Recommendation Letter

Dear Professor,

I hope you are doing well. I am currently applying for an MSc scholarship and wanted to respectfully ask whether you would be willing to provide me with a recommendation letter.

I had the privilege of studying Applied Physics under your guidance, and I believe your recommendation would strongly support my application. The submission deadline is April 30.

If you are comfortable supporting me, I would be happy to send my resume and statement of purpose for reference.

Thank you for considering my request.

Warm regards,
Victor Jose

intent: Remind a recruiter about an interview reschedule
key_facts: Interview was originally planned for Monday
You requested rescheduling due to a university exam
Ask for any updated slot this week
Reconfirm continued interest in the role
reference_email:
Subject: Follow-Up on Interview Rescheduling

Dear Recruiter,

I hope you are well. I wanted to follow up regarding the interview that was originally planned for Monday. As mentioned earlier, I had requested a reschedule due to a university exam.

Could you please let me know if there is any updated slot available this week? I remain very interested in the role and would be glad to attend at your convenience.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,
Victor Jose

intent: Send meeting notes to internal team
key_facts: Architecture discussion covered API, database, and authentication
Frontend owner is Priya
Backend API draft is due on Wednesday
Next sync is scheduled for 10 AM Friday
reference_email:
Subject: Summary of Today's Architecture Discussion

Hi Team,

Thank you for the productive discussion today. Here is a quick summary of the key decisions and next steps.

We reviewed the architecture across the API, database, and authentication layers. Priya will take ownership of the frontend. The backend API draft is expected by Wednesday.

Our next sync is scheduled for Friday at 10 AM.

Please let me know if I missed anything.

Regards,
Victor Jose

intent: Ask a vendor for pricing details
key_facts: Need pricing for 100 user licenses
Ask if annual billing discount is available
Request SLA details
Need response before Thursday procurement review
reference_email:
Subject: Request for Pricing and SLA Details

Dear Vendor Team,

We are currently evaluating solutions and would appreciate your support with a few details.

Could you please share pricing for 100 user licenses and confirm whether an annual billing discount is available? We would also appreciate receiving your SLA details for review.

As we have a procurement review scheduled for Thursday, it would be helpful to receive your response before then.

Thank you in advance.

Sincerely,
Victor Jose

key_facts: Current blocker is integration with third-party API
Need two additional working days
Core module is already complete
Will provide daily progress updates

Subject: Request for Short Project Extension

Dear Manager,

I wanted to provide a quick status update and request a short extension on the current timeline.

The main blocker at this stage is the integration with the third-party API. The core module is already complete, but I need two additional working days to finish the remaining integration and testing. I will also provide daily progress updates so you have clear visibility.

Thank you for your understanding.

Regards,
Victor Jose

key_facts: Thank them for the time today
Mention discussion about recommendation systems
Mention excitement about solving real business problems
Offer to share any additional information
reference_email:
Subject: Thank You for Today's Interview

Dear Panel,

Thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. I genuinely enjoyed our discussion, especially the conversation around recommendation systems and how they can be applied to real business problems.

The discussion increased my excitement about the opportunity to contribute and solve meaningful challenges with your team. Please feel free to let me know if I can share any additional information.
